title: apium × moorei
intro: Apium × moorei, also known as wild celery, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Wild celery can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
